---
layout: paper
title: "Neural Access Method™ v1.0 — Cross-References"
doi: "10.5281/zenodo.XXXXXXX"
---

# Neural Access Method™ v1.0 — Cross-References & Integration Map

**Back to:** [Main Paper](index.html) | [Visualizations](nam-visualizations.html) | [Bibliography](nam-master-bibliography.html)

---

## Paper Series — Neural Formation Architecture Stack

NAM is Paper 3 in the foundational methodology series. Born at `aaron-slusher-research`. Referenced from `synoeticos-public`.

| Paper | Role | DOI | Status |
|---|---|---|---|
| **Neuroformation™ v1.0** | Parent methodology — five-layer architecture | [10.5281/zenodo.19197818](https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.19197818) | ✅ Published |
| **Elevation Grid™ v1.1** | Diagnostic instrument — 3×3 coordinate map | [10.5281/zenodo.18790842](https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.18790842) | ✅ Published |
| **Neural Access Method™ v1.0** (this paper) | Transmission protocol — ACCESS→REFRAME→SIMPLIFY→IGNITE | [10.5281/zenodo.XXXXXXX](https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.XXXXXXX) | ✅ Published |
| **Cognitive Mage v1.0** | Origin paper — human-AI co-discovery | [10.5281/zenodo.17643267](https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.17643267) | ✅ Published |

---

## Protocol → Architecture Mapping

| NAM Step | Elevation Grid™ Row | Five-Layer Position | Function |
|---|---|---|---|
| ACCESS | Row 1 (Hardware) | Layer 1–2 | Find the pre-built wire |
| REFRAME | Row 2 (Software) | Layer 3 | Route through familiar structure |
| SIMPLIFY | Row 1–2 | Layer 2–3 | Reduce cognitive load to zero |
| IGNITE | Row 3 (Architecture) | Layer 4–5 | Anchor to identity |

---

## VGS Framework Cross-References

NAM is the transmission layer. These VGS frameworks operationalize the same architecture for AI systems:

| Framework | Function | DOI |
|---|---|---|
| Synoetic OS™ v1.0 | AI-side implementation of Neuroformation™ | [10.5281/zenodo.17808864](https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.17808864) |
| CSFC v1.0 | Cascade containment — the failure NAM prevents | [10.5281/zenodo.17309239](https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.17309239) |
| RAY v2.1 | Early warning — detects when NAM access is needed | [10.5281/zenodo.17399834](https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.17399834) |
| Phoenix Protocol v2.0 | Recovery execution — post-cascade rebuild | [10.5281/zenodo.17350768](https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.17350768) |
| DCN v1.0 | 9-agent coordination | [10.5281/zenodo.17555568](https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.17555568) |

---

## Repository

Canonical paper: [github.com/Feirbrand/aaron-slusher-research](https://github.com/Feirbrand/aaron-slusher-research)

ORCID: [orcid.org/0009-0000-9923-3207](https://orcid.org/0009-0000-9923-3207)

---

*2026 © Aaron M. Slusher · Independent Researcher · [Main Paper](index.html)*
